# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions of the project are currently being supported with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 21.x    | :white_check_mark: |
| < 21.0  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our project seriously. If you believe you’ve found a security vulnerability in this project, please report it to us following the steps below.

### Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues.

Instead, please report vulnerabilities by:
- Sending an email to **[Provide Security Email or akshhpatil's Email]**.
- You can also report via private vulnerability reporting on GitHub (if enabled for this repository).

### What to include in your report:
- A clear description of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
- Detailed steps to reproduce the issue (proof-of-concept code or screenshots are highly appreciated).
- The version(s) of the project affected.

### Our Response Process:
1. We will acknowledge receipt of your report within **48-72 hours**.
2. We will investigate the issue and confirm its validity within **7 days**.
3. We will work on a fix and coordinate a release date with you.
4. Once the fix is released, we will credit you for the discovery (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).

Thank you for helping keep this project secure!
